name: fullstack-demo
description: One-command setup for React Vite + Flask backend

scripts.install:backend: cd backend && python3 -m venv venv && ./venv/bin/pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.setup: npm run clean:ports && npm run install:frontend && npm run install:backend && npm run db:setup
scripts.start: npm run setup && npx concurrently --kill-others -n "BACKEND,FRONTEND" -c "bgBlue.bold,bgMagenta.bold" "npm run backend" "npm run frontend"
